name: WF-06: Mask-based SDXL inpaint (RealVisXL Inpainting)
description: Inpaint only masked regions using a dedicated SDXL Inpainting checkpoint and VAEEncodeForInpaint for seamless blending. White in mask = area to repaint.
author: Amoeba Works

_meta.title: Source RGB image (same size as mask)
Mask tensor from uploaded mask image

inputs.text: seamless wood texture, natural oak grain, matte finish, photorealistic, consistent lighting, high detail, professional product photography

_meta.title: Positive prompt (texture / material to apply in mask)

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, distorted, seams, tiling artifacts, watermark, text, cartoon, illustration, oversaturated, muddy

_meta.title: KSampler (denoise: high since using inpaint model)

inputs.text:
WF-06 MASK INPAINT (RealVisXL Inpainting)

=== INPUTS ===
- inpaint_source.png: full RGB image
- inpaint_mask.png: mask; white = repaint, black = keep (same size)

=== NOTES ===
- Uses VAEEncodeForInpaint to correctly pass the mask into the dedicated inpainting checkpoint.
